subject: Unchecked

body:

| | Friend, The end of the month is a very important time for our organization, especially this year. It is a time for us to make our plans for the month ahead. This January felt very different than those of the past: **it doesn 't feel like the campaign has ended, because for Republicans, it hasn't.** Republicans in the House and their extremist allies have been attacking House DFLers _non-stop_ since the legislative session began. We need your help. Can you make a contribution to our rapid response fund today? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ _ _ [**Contribute $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LLlWsGDb_bdSODMvAUuWyMZENBoZR5_j9vLcn00JP10=/6rKo9Otfuv5SwsHQuWy57IGFvtTVilF1bJcbUSIOLm0=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=013121) [**Contribute $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LLlWsGDb_bdSODMvAUuWyMZENBoZR5_j9vLcn00JP10=/6rKo9Otfuv5SwsHQuWy57IGFvtTVilF1bJcbUSIOLm0=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=013121) [**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LLlWsGDb_bdSODMvAUuWyMZENBoZR5_j9vLcn00JP10=/6rKo9Otfuv5SwsHQuWy57IGFvtTVilF1bJcbUSIOLm0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=013121) [**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LLlWsGDb_bdSODMvAUuWyMZENBoZR5_j9vLcn00JP10=/6rKo9Otfuv5SwsHQuWy57IGFvtTVilF1bJcbUSIOLm0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=013121) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LLlWsGDb_bdSODMvAUuWyMZENBoZR5_j9vLcn00JP10=/6rKo9Otfuv5SwsHQuWy57IGFvtTVilF1bJcbUSIOLm0=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=013121) **We can 't allow these extremist lies about the pandemic and the DFL go unchecked**. Your donation will help us to do that. Usually, we have some time to regroup after an election, but it appears we don't have the luxury of time on our side. We have to act _now_. I also want to remind you that if you want to help, but perhaps are worried about a financial contribution, the state of Minnesota allows you to donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and receive a full refund. Thank you for your support, Minnesota House DFL _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LLlWsGDb_bdSODMvAUuWyMZENBoZR5_j9vLcn00JP10=/6rKo9Otfuv5SwsHQuWy57IGFvtTVilF1bJcbUSIOLm0=?refcode=013121)

Peter,
I’d like to ask a favor. We are now only $790 away from reaching our January goal, and I really want to get there by midnight tonight. We made history when I became the first Black chair of TNDP – now let’s keep making it by crushing this fundraising goal!
Will you make a donation, whatever you can afford, and help us do this? Together we can turn Tennessee Blue! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/hendrell.png]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

clean_body: Don't miss out... | | | Triple Match LIVE Friend, Our TRIPLE match campaign ends in 24 hours , and I wanted to make sure you had a chance to contribute in time. We initiated this campaign in response to Biden’s radical executive order spree that took place during his first days in office. Cancelling the Keystone XL Pipeline Blowing out the cost of insulin Limiting ICE’s capacity to operate Proposing an amnesty plan These are just some of Biden’s priorities—none of which focus on helping struggling American families and businesses in this pandemic. All donations made in the next 24 hours will be triple matched and help us get our message across. Whatever you can give will be matched and multiplied. Please give generously before midnight TONIGHT and help us end January on a strong note. The higher the number, the louder the message we send. Thank you, Tim Burchett | Thank you for supporting my work in Congress. Please consider a donation today so we can continue fighting for our values. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Hoosier Republican,

The Democrats are going to be coming after Indiana big time in 2022. They are furious that Hoosiers voted decisively Republican, and they are determined to increase their majority in Congress by bringing a blue wave to our great state.

We’re closing in on our first fundraising deadline since the Dems took over the White House, Senate, and House of Representatives, and we have to send a strong message that Hoosiers and not about to let them take Indiana in 2022.

Please help us rebuild our war chest by donating just $5 or $10 right now. If every single person reading this gives up the cost of a single lunch out or even a fancy coffee, we can go a long way towards keeping Indiana RED.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Reform in Washington starts here
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Help fight back >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f4e65f9cd345d97e/e503cebf5ecb3039c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, I recently introduced my Roadmap to Reform to enact commonsense measures in Washington to defeat the corruption in the swamp. Not surprisingly, we’re already seeing pushback! The radical left LIKES their power, and they’re not going to willingly give it back to the people. There is almost no accountability whatsoever in today’s political environment, where the same career politicians get voted in over and over, votes on bills are demanded before Congress is given adequate time to truly read them, and representatives are able to break for recess before a national budget is passed! My Roadmap to Reform offers solutions to these and other fixable shortcomings in Congress. The commonsense ideas I’m working on aren’t Republican or Democrat, they’re American. Our government needs to work for the people again. Our first fundraising deadline of 2021 is just HOURS away, and we still need to raise $1798 to reach our goal. **[Will you please help by chipping in what you can right now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f4e65f9cd345d97e/301cc00aa018e82ec3d6b838967d376c/34143)** Even just a few dollars helps! Thanks for taking a stand with me,
Kevin Hern [**CHIP IN $5 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f4e65f9cd345d97e/c2bca008c5354547c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $10 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f4e65f9cd345d97e/0856f30892f03ecdc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $20 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f4e65f9cd345d97e/604a9819c436dacfc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $50 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f4e65f9cd345d97e/db92822a5e8b364fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress

body:
We’ve set a $10,000 end-of-month goal.
#

Hi — wanted to make sure you saw Mondaire’s email from yesterday. We rely on small-dollar donations from emails like this one to power our movement, and we’ve set a **$10,000 end-of-month goal** to make sure we stay on track.
**[Please make a contribution to our campaign to help re-elect Mondaire before midnight. We need to ensure we’re ready for any challenge that comes our way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24467335/270793617/-1334096792?refcode2=e7fa00f9-f963-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210131-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZhMDBmOS1mOTYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7VzvGt1O9vlXr2igAf_y3optiWODSXrcISBQnoq2s8=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24467336/270793618/-1334096792?refcode2=e7fa00f9-f963-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210131-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZhMDBmOS1mOTYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7VzvGt1O9vlXr2igAf_y3optiWODSXrcISBQnoq2s8=)**
**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before the end of this month. My team has set a goal to raise $10,000 before midnight.**
Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-january-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24467337/270793619/-1334096792?refcode2=e7fa00f9-f963-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210131-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZhMDBmOS1mOTYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7VzvGt1O9vlXr2igAf_y3optiWODSXrcISBQnoq2s8=)**).
It has been less than a month since I was sworn into the 117th Congress, but already my experience is unlike anything I could have imagined. On my fourth day, my colleagues and I were under siege by a mob of white supremacist terrorists, who were incited by then-President Donald Trump.
This week, a journalist at _Politico_ asked me how the historic nature of being the first openly gay Black member of Congress influences my work. I told him that it gives me a lens through which I can see how the policies we debate in Congress impact marginalized communities like the ones to which I belong, and a deep sense of urgency to change the status quo.
I told him that it’s no coincidence I was among the first members of Congress to call for the second impeachment of Donald Trump, having been under attack by a mob of white nationalist terrorists who felt threatened by my very existence. When your very existence is under attack, vague, hypothetical notions of “unity” are not top of mind.
I understood from the outset of the attempted coup that if we failed to hold Donald Trump and his co-conspirators in Congress accountable for their actions, we would find ourselves under attack again. If we fail to bar this twice-impeached ex-President from ever running for office again, the assault on our democracy, on communities of color, and on the LGBTQ+ community will continue.
I will not stop pushing for accountability from all who had a role in the events of January 6th. I am proud to co-sponsor Congresswoman Cori Bush’s resolution to investigate and expel those Members of Congress who incited the insurrection.
We also have other critical work ahead. We must crush the coronavirus pandemic and send much-needed economic relief to working families. We must save the planet from climate catastrophe while creating millions of green jobs. We must deliver health care to everyone.
**[Your financial support allows me to focus on the work that matters instead of worrying about fundraising for re-election during next year’s redistricting. If you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $10,000 goal and allow me to be the progressive champion you expect me to be during these difficult months ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24467338/270793620/-1334096792?refcode2=e7fa00f9-f963-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210131-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ZhMDBmOS1mOTYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j7VzvGt1O9vlXr2igAf_y3optiWODSXrcISBQnoq2s8=)**
Thank you for your continued support. Our fight has only just begun, and your donation of any amount is a real assertion of power. When we report our fundraising numbers, any potential opponent will see that this movement is here to stay.
Onward,
Mondaire

---
**DEAR SUPPORTERS,**
---
**Representative Harris is a disgrace. He has cynically courted his supporters for personal gain while trampling upon his oath to protect and defend the Constitution.** **I have also taken the oath to protect and defend. That oath has never left me. It is why I served in the Armed Forces, and it is why I continue to serve as a citizen and a candidate for District 1. Loyal to the ideals that formed our great country, I remain committed to being**
**everyone’s representative.**
---
| | [ PLEASE CONTRIBUTE. YOUR SUPPORT IS IMPORTANT! ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=353215.1419.1.e8f5adac57eec5d1ec2b7eb2c4890505&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MTgxMjczNS0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1iNjBkMzYwMTcxN2EwMGJmYTI5YjQzNTZjOGQzMmZjODkxN2UxZjYzIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjM1MzIxNSJ9)
---
**You supported me when I was walking door to door in every nook and cranny of our beautiful shoreline district. You supported me while I personally called and listened to hundreds tell me their stories of being dismissed and made fearful by Harris. You supported me because you believe that people matter and serving them is a privilege that demands humility, courage, and tenacity.** **We accomplished so much together. My commitment to people over politics brought in an abundance of new voters. My campaign was fueled by committed volunteers, and YOU. I am truly grateful.** **Now we can do more. Please continue to support my campaign. We need change from the grassroots up. It’s time for compassionate leadership.**
---
**YOUR CANDIDATE,** **MIA MASON**
---
---
Paid for by Mia Mason for Congress

You supported me because you believe that people matter and serving them is a privilege that demands humility, courage, and tenacity. We accomplished so much together. My commitment to people over politics brought in an abundance of new voters. My campaign was fueled by committed volunteers, and YOU. I am truly grateful. Now we can do more. Please continue to support my campaign. We need change from the grassroots up. It’s time for compassionate leadership. YOUR CANDIDATE, MIA MASON Paid for by Mia Mason for Congress | | "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" "YouTube" ©2021 Mia Mason for Congress | 600-B Abruzzi Dr suite 112, Chester, MD 21619 | = "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" | ?

name: True the Vote
subject: UPDATE to yesterday’s Weekly Update | 1.31.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3920)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | THE WORK AHEAD
---
| |
It has not yet been thirty days since the 117th Congress began, and not even ten since the Biden administration was inaugurated. Across the country newly reshuffled state legislatures are just getting underway, and yet we can already see how much work there is yet to do.

So, here's what we know right now. We're looking at:

* [H.R.1](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjElM0ZxJTNEJTI1N0IlMjUyMnNlYXJjaCUyNTIyJTI1M0ElMjU1QiUyNTIySC5SLiUyQjElMjUyMiUyNTVEJTI1N0QlMjZzJTNEMyUyNnIlM0Qx&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3921) and [S.1](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZGVtb2NyYXRzLnNlbmF0ZS5nb3YlMkZpbW8lMkZtZWRpYSUyRmRvYyUyRlNJTVBMRS1TRUNUSU9OLUJZLVNFQ1RJT05fUy4tMTEucGRm&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3948) \- This is the #1 bill in play right now. H.R. 1 will fundamentally transform elections; federalizing operations and oversight as never before. It forces states to adopt things like same-day registration, establishes mass mail ballots, cripples state voter ID standards, limits voter roll maintenance, and expands voter harvesting (which, for the record, we are going to begin referring to as vote trafficking, because that's what it is. It's the predatory practice of exploiting vulnerable communities and stealing their votes. Vote Trafficking). UPDATE: Here’s some info on the Senate partner bill S.1. Still haven’t seen the full bill language as filed, but the Senate Democrats have [posted this outline](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZGVtb2NyYXRzLnNlbmF0ZS5nb3YlMkZpbW8lMkZtZWRpYSUyRmRvYyUyRlNJTVBMRS1TRUNUSU9OLUJZLVNFQ1RJT05fUy4tMTEucGRm&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3948).
* [S.51](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/senate-bill/51?q=%7B%22search%22%3A%22HR+51%22%7Damp;s=8amp;r=2&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3922) and [H.R.51](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjUxJTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMkguUi4lMkI1MSUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnMlM0QyJTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3923) \- Senate and House versions of the Washington, D.C. Statehood Admission Act ... to make Washington, DC a state. (it's rare that Senate and House bill numbers match, but this bill would make DC the 51st state, so they matched the numbers for symbolic effect...)
* [S.136](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/senate-bill/136?q=%7B%22search%22%3A%22election%22%7Damp;s=5amp;r=6&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3924) and [H.R.237](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjIzNyUzRnElM0QlMjU3QiUyNTIyc2VhcmNoJTI1MjIlMjUzQSUyNTVCJTI1MjJILlIuJTJCMjM3JTI1MjIlMjU1RCUyNTdEJTI2cyUzRDElMjZyJTNEMQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3925) \- Senate and House versions of a "Vote at Home" Act(s) both to amend the Help America Vote Act of 2002 to allow all eligible voters to vote by mail in Federal elections, standardize ballot dropboxes, amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 to provide for automatic voter registration. The [National Vote at Home Institute](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ2b3RlYXRob21lLm9yZyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3926) has been working these bills hard on the Hill (and they started long before COVID...like all these bills, what's in them has been a long time in the making...)
* [H.J.Res.14](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbiUyRjE0JTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMkguSi4lMkJSRVMlMkIxNCUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnMlM0Q0JTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3927) \- Proposes an amendment to the Constitution of the United States to abolish the electoral college and to provide for the direct election of the President and Vice President of the United States (aka [National Popular Vote](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubmF0aW9uYWxwb3B1bGFydm90ZS5jb20lMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3928) aka mob rule)

On the radar from the 116th and almost sure to reappear in the 117th...

* Last session's [H.R. 4](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExNnRoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjQlM0ZxJTNEJTI1N0IlMjUyMnNlYXJjaCUyNTIyJTI1M0ElMjU1QiUyNTIyaHI0JTI1MjIlMjU1RCUyNTdEJTI2cyUzRDEwJTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3929) and[ S.4263](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExNnRoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwlMkY0MjYzJTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMlMuNDI2MyUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnMlM0QyJTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3930), the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which hasn't been reintroduced in the 117th yet, but it most assuredly will. Here's a take on the bill from the [Human Rights Campaign](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuaHJjLm9yZyUyRnJlc291cmNlcyUyRnZvdGluZy1yaWdodHMtYWR2YW5jZW1lbnQtYWN0&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3931), discussing their position that Voter ID is a form of suppression to the LGBTQ community because transgender voters do not have ID that accurately reflects their gender (yes, you read that correctly).News Flash: gender isn’t a qualification to vote. Voter ID presents no suppressive intent to the transgender, or any other, community. The U.S. is the only industrialized country in the world that does not require a standardized form of Voter ID.
* Last session's [H.R.4901](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExNnRoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjQ5MDElM0ZxJTNEJTI1N0IlMjUyMnNlYXJjaCUyNTIyJTI1M0ElMjU1QiUyNTIySFIlMkI0OTAxJTI1MjIlMjU1RCUyNTdEJTI2cyUzRDUlMjZyJTNEMg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3932) \- Puerto Rico Statehood Admission Act...making Puerto Rico a state, too.

There are other bills, like [H.R. 322](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjMyMiUyRnRleHQ=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3933), a bill put forward by Rep. Jim Banks, a Republican from Indiana, to amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 and the Help America Vote Act of 2002 to promote integrity in voter registration, the casting of ballots, the tabulation of ballots in elections for Federal office, and other integrity-focused reforms. It is highly unlikely anything like this would pass, but the drafting of these bills is important because it keeps aglow an ember of the election integrity debate that must occur if we are to find our way back to free and fair elections.

We will work hard to keep TTVers apprised of these and other bills, but for those who are interested, check out [ Congress.gov ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRmNvbmdyZXNzLmdvdiUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3934) and set up bill trackings so they can see the bills, track changes, and get familiar with the landscape. Download the bills as PDFs, word search them, ask your representatives about them, [ask us](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZjb250YWN0JTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3935). And check out what's happening with election reform in [your own state](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkYlMjNtYXA=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3936).

Meanwhile, we are still working on opportunities to open up research projects, open source what we're finding and crowdsource solutions, while still fighting in court to stop the intimidation tactics of Stacy Abrams' Fair Fight Action (see [True the Vote v. Fair Fight Action](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3937)) and protect every citizen's right to question their government without fear of retribution.

Stay the course, fellow patriot. We are in this together.

On the January 24th episode of ABC’s This Week, host George Stephanopoulos spoke with guest Sen. Rand Paul about the results of the 2020 presidential election. The two engaged in a heated discussion, with the host demanding the Senator accede to a statement as being fact, and the Senator repeatedly asserting that such a demand was designed to impugn his character and that of everyone who believes it is important to root out fraud or abuse that may have taken place.

In the clip below, the two sides of the argument seem on the surface to be about whether or not the 2020 election was "stolen" by means of fraud or abuse.

[That is not, however, the important point in the video, which you can watch...](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZhYmNzLWdlb3JnZS1zdGVwaGFub3BvdWxvcy1hbmQtc2VuYXRvci1yYW5kLXBhdWwtc3Bhci1vdmVyLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=366A860A20A3938)

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | THE WORK AHEAD | | It has not yet been thirty days since the 117th Congress began, and not even ten since the Biden administration was inaugurated. Across the country newly reshuffled state legislatures are just getting underway, and yet we can already see how much work there is yet to do. So, here's what we know right now. We're looking at: and \- This is the #1 bill in play right now. H.R. 1 will fundamentally transform elections; federalizing operations and oversight as never before. It forces states to adopt things like same-day registration, establishes mass mail ballots, cripples state voter ID standards, limits voter roll maintenance, and expands voter harvesting (which, for the record, we are going to begin referring to as vote trafficking, because that's what it is. It's the predatory practice of exploiting vulnerable communities and stealing their votes. Vote Trafficking). UPDATE: Here’s some info on the Senate partner bill S.1. Still haven’t seen the full bill language as filed, but the Senate Democrats have . and \- Senate and House versions of the Washington, D.C. Statehood Admission Act ... to make Washington, DC a state. (it's rare that Senate and House bill numbers match, but this bill would make DC the 51st state, so they matched the numbers for symbolic effect...) and \- Senate and House versions of a "Vote at Home" Act(s) both to amend the Help America Vote Act of 2002 to allow all eligible voters to vote by mail in Federal elections, standardize ballot dropboxes, amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 to provide for automatic voter registration. The has been working these bills hard on the Hill (and they started long before COVID...like all these bills, what's in them has been a long time in the making...) \- Proposes an amendment to the Constitution of the United States to abolish the electoral college and to provide for the direct election of the President and Vice President of the United States (aka aka mob rule) On the radar from the 116th and almost sure to reappear in the 117th... Last session's and, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which hasn't been reintroduced in the 117th yet, but it most assuredly will. Here's a take on the bill from the , discussing their position that Voter ID is a form of suppression to the LGBTQ community because transgender voters do not have ID that accurately reflects their gender (yes, you read that correctly).News Flash: gender isn’t a qualification to vote. Voter ID presents no suppressive intent to the transgender, or any other, community. The U.S. is the only industrialized country in the world that does not require a standardized form of Voter ID. Last session's \- Puerto Rico Statehood Admission Act...making Puerto Rico a state, too. There are other bills, like , a bill put forward by Rep. Jim Banks, a Republican from Indiana, to amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 and the Help America Vote Act of 2002 to promote integrity in voter registration, the casting of ballots, the tabulation of ballots in elections for Federal office, and other integrity-focused reforms. It is highly unlikely anything like this would pass, but the drafting of these bills is important because it keeps aglow an ember of the election integrity debate that must occur if we are to find our way back to free and fair elections. We will work hard to keep TTVers apprised of these and other bills, but for those who are interested, check out and set up bill trackings so they can see the bills, track changes, and get familiar with the landscape. Download the bills as PDFs, word search them, ask your representatives about them, . And check out what's happening with election reform in . Meanwhile, we are still working on opportunities to open up research projects, open source what we're finding and crowdsource solutions, while still fighting in court to stop the intimidation tactics of Stacy Abrams' Fair Fight Action (see ) and protect every citizen's right to question their government without fear of retribution. Stay the course, fellow patriot. We are in this together. | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote | | | | | TTV NEWS | | On the January 24th episode of ABC’s This Week, host George Stephanopoulos spoke with guest Sen. Rand Paul about the results of the 2020 presidential election. The two engaged in a heated discussion, with the host demanding the Senator accede to a statement as being fact, and the Senator repeatedly asserting that such a demand was designed to impugn his character and that of everyone who believes it is important to root out fraud or abuse that may have taken place. In the clip below, the two sides of the argument seem on the surface to be about whether or not the 2020 election was "stolen" by means of fraud or abuse. | | WHAT YOU CAN DO | | There is still a great deal more yet to be done in the fight for the vote. You can be a part of the process along with True the Vote. Just staying informed as citizen by receiving all our news and updates, you'll be helping to ensure the health of our system. You can be an integral part of citizen-led efforts to ensure the integrity of your local ballot process. And with new apps and new ways to help right in your own backyard, you'll have phenomenal tools to get the job done right. Don't wait. After all that's happened, after all the hardship of the last year, let's not waste one more minute just watching. Let's start doing something about it, together. Sign up, Stay informed, and Volunteer with True the Vote! | | | | | | | | | | Engage with us on Social Media: | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 True the Vote, All rights reserved | | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

body:
You see, this is bigger than just one seat. We're only a handful of seats away from reclaiming the House Majority and it very well could come down to who wins this seat.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WyDt2zKKMkD0Uy1AqP4yjQogrhHfsmJeE89OoLSnpNoAQr9zdXGI9zbnujs4zlhXC2KOYgwArjNANpkXr0sF8MD5-vQsVenogGMDFkJ4cs98Lbp0fn0xDnHpxVMRZ2aufneIsqnE3HEXQqhUkk6bAEXsnQ8b9FsrbB-Dcmd8MieO96eKWNaexpDzpdfDKcmkuwZ0EyoON9esFtkVZlf9qZR5NYZ8zI44c6KKTZqWqRWLbDKfpjbUefEQsDX6VKtDZBYexOze91Qgh0LRrpptTyAJ1lcunba02_n8gl2Be2gl_BEazDiT7Acr4brw5qidcJ7kUh0e8ZkfLVJroovifk4cB_bgT4z-Ry71z1LIHO-uE9cSJkGjelUJwTXZSWZz7ju5vU4MKRlBm3UEwpvOHYInClz-zT2bIDek16pSC_Od6vHWDpYXdA==&c=exEcFEPPshrRv-svf5rhAnu8BPkbZWHhhRVuVDmZg9DBzbGxXE2rEA==&ch=VUzSCORAvHGwJHplDEy6vse-SKv2e2lRpaT65O1OpcsIYQaSCGt7YQ==)

Friend, we are only hours away from the first important deadline of the year and unfortunately, as of right now, we aren't where we need to be. Reaching our goal before midnight tonight is 100% critical to winning not only this seat but flipping the House Majority from blue to red. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to donate to our campaign, but first I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why your support is make or break.

I'll start with some background -- We flipped California's 39th Congressional District RED, a seat only recently turned blue by Nancy Pelosi and a self-funded millionaire opponent. They spent millions in dark money, tapped into our opponent's personal fortune, and spent $20+ million to defeat us -- but despite their massive war chests and outspending us at every turn, we won.

Unfortunately, we're not in the clear. We won by the smallest of margins -- only a couple thousand votes -- and Nancy Pelosi is determined to defeat us and keep the House under her thumb. California's 39th Congressional District is the second most blue seat held by a Republican -- making this seat a toss-up and a top-target.

So you see, this is bigger than just one seat. We're only a handful of seats away from reclaiming the House Majority for Republicans and it very well could come down to who wins this seat. That's why, today, I have to ask: [**Can you chip in $5, $10, or even just $1 to help spread our common-sense message and win back the House for Republicans?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WyDt2zKKMkD0Uy1AqP4yjQogrhHfsmJeE89OoLSnpNoAQr9zdXGI98fpYmfHlH0-c-sbmDD2RKa5Y4K17tjhl8D-6pwynW21uATK2D1bx641WaR0aJA8IPEvVl3VNdPgsndegxUwvv3t-wQ9SU_4ujI2zYHtaIaKtXquB9mif7FpE_ENC0_VWHOLoVrGJ42dXVhZHXxzsfKs5mdt66RG2plMwPeqoNQgTWnpyDeBVAXgRZ_n15UQdi7vG73CPMngB6uaWGo3IMNaGv_aZ3U1-zz78bxnoxKMSanrDTe-TCbjgifoiJIWC0E9OU6fvYJc9nGxndFdFKZSzEFpQSby10e28PIlOT5RNFilGueW-Lmwv4w47464wxbG4hAaEWj0admE6F5IH8OvNg4IfxfDOZtxTZ_hKHnhQ0emxLdbRIF6bTp9__NkPg==&c=exEcFEPPshrRv-svf5rhAnu8BPkbZWHhhRVuVDmZg9DBzbGxXE2rEA==&ch=VUzSCORAvHGwJHplDEy6vse-SKv2e2lRpaT65O1OpcsIYQaSCGt7YQ==)

I'm committed to advocating for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. I'm an immigrant and proud conservative woman and I have never backed down from a challenge. I put myself through college, started my own small business, raised a family, and became one of the first Korean American women to serve in Congress. I will continue to fight for what's right, but I can't do it alone.

**With a tough road ahead of us, we 're going to need all hands on deck. [Can we count on you to chip in $5 right now to defend this seat?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WyDt2zKKMkD0Uy1AqP4yjQogrhHfsmJeE89OoLSnpNoAQr9zdXGI9_x-PHOF2g9BIDvJxuwT_aVw9pNWVnxayFpswiRPZGPfHvfYwwEGF6FFQ31psQZBcP3IBmDAW5_Exljy4VF983MbXrogFfk4xXQALS3utTOaT09XtTJQ_khXoTE0q2b7RNRhhfCuegDsfRYYLJUkAmOQc0shoIOjIajqIkxoBu5rgpod4EVluLULdMQlLnH3r3NB5RkLgsBymjGQVy3u7A7RbKNQJi7ccm_CElzalIQhKRY7CAk6KBslPsnTV3HqZnJWIUGg3mQZADNUJiHa0_Y8b9hbWTgny7hQisdBXdk6eCy9M8UPpqFT9nysYTORc-aOZR1_legSwbybJHU9Atqsdvj_gLGueDZfKfGBl3XmbwEllcdSb1zD95lu0vUcyMVA-CCPDoDV&c=exEcFEPPshrRv-svf5rhAnu8BPkbZWHhhRVuVDmZg9DBzbGxXE2rEA==&ch=VUzSCORAvHGwJHplDEy6vse-SKv2e2lRpaT65O1OpcsIYQaSCGt7YQ==)**

We have only hours left before tonight's midnight deadline. But don't wait until the last minute to chip in. We can't let the Democrats flip this seat back to blue!

Thank you for all that you do,

Young Kim
[****](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WyDt2zKKMkD0Uy1AqP4yjQogrhHfsmJeE89OoLSnpNoAQr9zdXGI98fpYmfHlH0-c-sbmDD2RKa5Y4K17tjhl8D-6pwynW21uATK2D1bx641WaR0aJA8IPEvVl3VNdPgsndegxUwvv3t-wQ9SU_4ujI2zYHtaIaKtXquB9mif7FpE_ENC0_VWHOLoVrGJ42dXVhZHXxzsfKs5mdt66RG2plMwPeqoNQgTWnpyDeBVAXgRZ_n15UQdi7vG73CPMngB6uaWGo3IMNaGv_aZ3U1-zz78bxnoxKMSanrDTe-TCbjgifoiJIWC0E9OU6fvYJc9nGxndFdFKZSzEFpQSby10e28PIlOT5RNFilGueW-Lmwv4w47464wxbG4hAaEWj0admE6F5IH8OvNg4IfxfDOZtxTZ_hKHnhQ0emxLdbRIF6bTp9__NkPg==&c=exEcFEPPshrRv-svf5rhAnu8BPkbZWHhhRVuVDmZg9DBzbGxXE2rEA==&ch=VUzSCORAvHGwJHplDEy6vse-SKv2e2lRpaT65O1OpcsIYQaSCGt7YQ==)

**THEN:** The Democrats launched ads against us less than two weeks after Michelle was sworn in.

**NOW:** Our opponent, and Pelosi's candidate, is already organizing against us, preparing a grassroots team and campaign war chest capable of unseating us.

**Your support has never been more important. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e_-zjdCWDRgXB_WcScuJt0DhkT6u9SF3oPoR2XpE0jK-NxADzjWjQCwB40ztzfwgj11zZTOHy-wFNaBQxKaJ3e5kBHzHWrU8fZuu0dpbCidvtsqyu33tDIyslNNyZfq4VlRSVNobQxI=&c=hHqzO_4GRcjtOTVByiUzsazAMFBECIfLKdvAUzMMLhn_kGyQ1T_jDA==&ch=uizxSXHFvt-W1P60Aj-wJF1Mi1nZJWwei3Fck0nOVUAos2jeN1OgZg==).

name: Team Marco
subject: danger of closed schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
_**" Not one penny money should go to schools that are not getting kids back in the classroom."**_
-Senator Marco Rubio Friend,

Doctors, nurses, firefighters, police officers, garbage men, cashiers at grocery stores, letter carriers & Florida teachers are _**WORKING**_.

_**BILLIONS**_ in COVID funds have been approved to help get teachers and students across the country back into the classroom.

_**Despite the massive funding and scientific evidence that it is safe for kids to be back in school, Teachers ' Unions are saying NO!**_

Children are falling further and further behind the longer they are out of school. Not only are many floundering academically, but socially and emotionally as well.

For months, we have been talking about the need to get kids back to the classroom. We've allocated BILLIONS to do it safely. Teachers are getting vaccinated. But now, none of that is good enough for these Teachers' Unions, who refuse to allow teachers and students back to the classroom. While these Teachers' Unions continue the gridlock, it's our children who suffer.

We can not let this go on any longer. **SHOULD RELIEF FUNDS BE WITHHELD FROM SCHOOLS WHO REFUSE TO REOPEN?**

_**[[YES]](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aeAMQvm3IlGi66zIjuhw2EbFEXNu6Oh60qziT2J9-wR-juMiOrgO04ci2se5oc2w9WdGXfa4YU1sztp2iBhml05UhzCy5dVEd78MQUxJZAFHUsrb1PnSEF6_yP2VLDrrD-SBFwt9iwb2JxM6Urrie-S_77SRkb4X7V9gvSO-5ofFECU2K365wXWrNDTvqaF9tsNhuPQ7XxJDGx15aV6SSJnZ5jLpdBMbZBZDqH4ZTbnpeyPQzFE69RPeIraVv3wFoSajcyy-L5ya3PEs7-7hFZd54hpIW2kFNjp4AVPPB8pZ9OCQ7-df9Nvl-3oH_6ajJ_lq0YlH5OHrpKpOu3ulCOuTbB7O-03QXeeShx0bTaxpwRbVDOdUdeygSQ_oOflqPMf4NKeFeRKpxPzSHrZbNCbb0MI2LYK8&c=rZvjah-l5bzib2vIb_8JwXurMn6QAUmW_wp4PH0xlnlprWsN13SFiw==&ch=tNNLHqCykWWdZUHOW7zW3BTTNfgga9aRuy32SQRgWYwBmSt0c8gbJA== "YES")**_ _**[[NO]](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aeAMQvm3IlGi66zIjuhw2EbFEXNu6Oh60qziT2J9-wR-juMiOrgO04ci2se5oc2w9WdGXfa4YU1sztp2iBhml05UhzCy5dVEd78MQUxJZAFHUsrb1PnSEF6_yP2VLDrrD-SBFwt9iwb2JxM6Urrie-S_77SRkb4X7V9gvSO-5ofFECU2K365wXWrNDTvqaF9tsNhuPQ7XxJDGx15aV6SSJnZ5jLpdBMbZBZDqH4ZTbnpeyPQzFE69RPeIraVv3wFoSajcyy-L5ya3PEs7-7hFZd54hpIW2kFNjp4AVPPB8pZ9OCQ7-df9Nvl-3oH_6ajJ_lq0YlH5OHrpKpOu3ulCOuTbB7O-03QXeeShx0bTaxpwRbVDOdUdeygSQ_oOflqPMf4NKeFeRKpxPzSHrZbNCbb0MI2LYK8&c=rZvjah-l5bzib2vIb_8JwXurMn6QAUmW_wp4PH0xlnlprWsN13SFiw==&ch=tNNLHqCykWWdZUHOW7zW3BTTNfgga9aRuy32SQRgWYwBmSt0c8gbJA== "NO")**_

clean_body: " Not one penny money should go to schools that are not getting kids back in the classroom." -Senator Marco Rubio Friend, Doctors, nurses, firefighters, police officers, garbage men, cashiers at grocery stores, letter carriers & Florida teachers are WORKING. BILLIONS in COVID funds have been approved to help get teachers and students across the country back into the classroom. Despite the massive funding and scientific evidence that it is safe for kids to be back in school, Teachers ' Unions are saying NO! Children are falling further and further behind the longer they are out of school. Not only are many floundering academically, but socially and emotionally as well. For months, we have been talking about the need to get kids back to the classroom. We've allocated BILLIONS to do it safely. Teachers are getting vaccinated. But now, none of that is good enough for these Teachers' Unions, who refuse to allow teachers and students back to the classroom. While these Teachers' Unions continue the gridlock, it's our children who suffer. We can not let this go on any longer. SHOULD RELIEF FUNDS BE WITHHELD FROM SCHOOLS WHO REFUSE TO REOPEN? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
In a race as competitive as ours is sure to be and in a state as purple as New Hampshire, every single donation makes a huge difference.
Hello,
We're only just coming off of the 2020 election and Mitch McConnell and far-right Republicans are already laser-focused on unseating me this cycle.
They're coming after me early because they think defeating me is their best chance at winning back Senate control.**Reporters are even saying that Kelly Ayotte, who I ousted by just _1,017 votes_ , is considering getting in the race for a rematch.**
Early momentum is the ONLY way I can defend this seat -- and the Senate majority. **I need to raise another $8,177 before tonight's January fundraising deadline, and I 'm asking for $3 or more from you to get us there. [Will you please pitch in right now?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7fc/2a380d31/218d49d8/f053ce/3135399076/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEzMV9lb20yX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210131_eom2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Falling short means inviting McConnell and corporate special interests to launch baseless attacks against me. That's a risk we absolutely cannot afford.
In a race as competitive as ours is sure to be and in a state as purple as New Hampshire, every single donation makes a huge difference -- and it could be the deciding factor between holding on to this vulnerable seat or losing it to Republicans.
[**I hope you know, I 'm so grateful to have you with me, and I'm really hoping you can support my campaign and protect the Senate majority by giving $3 or more right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7fc/2a380d31/218d49d8/f053ce/3135399076/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEzMV9lb20yX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210131_eom2_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/eQNysv-_NSTN8hYjkFh_eXc9SWhyLdtOD-nBPZWuBdA=/uWR3Pq5wkrkFAp0fuzK_SnEcrpNFUI7M5NZFiPti5FU=?refcode=210131-email) Hi Peter, With the end of the month approaching, my team and I are trying to raise the last $1,000 we need to power us through the next few weeks before midnight. So I'm asking you personally: [_**Is there any amount you can donate today to reach this goal and help us keep up the fight?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/eQNysv-_NSTN8hYjkFh_eXc9SWhyLdtOD-nBPZWuBdA=/uWR3Pq5wkrkFAp0fuzK_SnEcrpNFUI7M5NZFiPti5FU=?refcode=210131-email) Right now, there are still 22 legally-cast ballots that my opponent is trying to stop from being counted. **These voters did everything right, but their votes were not counted in this race.** You know me, so you know I take this stuff seriously. Our votes are our voices in this democracy, and they need to be counted. **Anything you can give before tonight will help my team and me make sure these voters are heard and we get an accurate result in this incredibly close race.** Here's the link to give: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rita-hart-recount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eQNysv-_NSTN8hYjkFh_eXc9SWhyLdtOD-nBPZWuBdA=/uWR3Pq5wkrkFAp0fuzK_SnEcrpNFUI7M5NZFiPti5FU=?refcode=210131-email) Thank you for everything you're doing. This goal is make-or-break for our campaign and, right now, we’re a bit short of reaching it and I’m starting to get worried. But it’s going to take all of us doing what we can to make sure this campaign is the strongest it can possibly be. | | | | | I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important. body:

Friend,

Democrats want to destroy our American way of life and, if we don't have the resources to stop them, they just might succeed. It's that simple.

**From Your Capitol – Week of January 25, 2021
Fear of Government**
| | | [](http://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/mGf_bBBUfaBUxBEFvkAqL7EbHg2685V7oVTc21tEPvEwUGSplc7qWnG9T5_bdiNuNA2fUxY4MEOfHKliwiIuC87gNs2WjDFSrrUO7rcbCyz8kCxLs_qxrAnhcRBHnFxwEELE68G1JeLhswywIYdkkdqQJ-CkeA_w686fE9xQga6hT9JH)
---
| |
---
| | Earlier this week I had a conversation with my son, who returned home from a two year adventure in Oregon and is on his way to a new adventure in Canada. Our conversation around politics and COVID turned to a conversation about how easily people have been manipulated by politicians and healthcare bureaucrats and what our nation's future holds. During our conversation he asked me a question that caused me some discomfort. The question was, “What do you fear?” My initial answer was that I don’t have any deep fears. I believe after 57 years of life I have confronted many of the fears we all face through out life. When I was in high school I feared non-acceptance by those who were “cool” or a part of the “in” crowd. After spending much of my high school years on the outside of that group, by college I had learned to overcome that fear and be more secure with myself, even if not accepted by some specific group. But new fears arose during college that proved more difficult to overcome. The fear of being inadequate, after failing most of my freshman classes there was a great fear that I would never accomplish anything in my life. With no direction in life I returned home to work at Godfather’s Pizza. I started taking flying lessons at the local airport. Accomplishing the goal of getting my pilots license taught me to meet the fear of being inadequate head on, so I returned to college to get a bachelors degree and then a masters degree. Throughout my life I’ve met and overcome many of the fears that I’ve experienced. I’ve learned to function without being accepted by the “in” crowd, I don’t spend time and energy trying to prove that I’m smart or adequate. I don’t fear failure because I’ve failed many times and survived and I have reached the pinnacle of my chosen career. I don’t fear rejection because I have a family that accepts me and will never reject me. So that leaves the question, What do I fear? I fear government! From the time the nation of Israel demanded a king, government has oppressed, killed, and abused its citizens more often than not. Kings became tyrants, leaders tax their people to pay for their pleasures while watching the people suffer. I cannot find a single example of a government official starving to death, but there are countless example of nations of people dying of starvation, execution and imprisonment at the hands of their government. Under the guise of compassion we see government today denying people needed medical procedures, forcing medications and at times denying needed medications. During the COVID “crisis” we’ve seen government officials around our country and even in Mississippi use this time as an opportunity to enrich themselves and their friends while oppressing the people. The fear of government is what drives me today to be involved in that very government. By being involved with government I have more opportunity to expose those who seek to benefit themselves at the expense of others. I firmly believe that history proves me correct, the stronger government becomes the more of a threat it becomes to it’s citizens. Franklin D. Roosevelt is often quoted as saying “the only thing we have to fear is fear itself,” It is my firm belief that the only thing we have to fear is GOVERNMENT.
---
| |
---

body:
The Future of the Republican Party.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f9C1vSYM8qwld2FrO4gBh5S2jD-sb9w4ooiSJGXAAZxq20MJcS9gGS0HH3MNW5A9XLLqUHBZ1pCVQLHzp0y44myblR9gR2Nif5BGKmU5-tsPxtN7MW9GaV2kxxDXYU-RKbmbMPo9QKlgJ2KA0WOK2cjcoFl_mbSzbRvhr5D8GgNKob6NX2_0uRKEGfwNHwO5hhCd7E5RAmDu1ZG7RYF3gZTin4hFb0g6OgWdH7OUoPaSAnUTYC7OKOD9Z_T2ZwsP4q8aIVFjkP9Si568SVHFzzuVVrQy-ddqw1JJLTFgz6YYTfrH4CoQELH3_K3MlfG7GxQZQ6HK8xGSySSAKma7p5udxarQE3goUVdPJyYAw6fTzBUqRpZPNc4NEiGbQMPkIN-5pqz2l-Kk83UTdzrowu8Td61P3boruGY-MfoWjWMog3Ezxtdn8PWHtk-QTlbvKWQ0Y3bCZxI=&c=VcAj1IR2BULNJtwRIsJhBQdvbVQiQ0yiaV5AuDMeNUCOmUPOrBRQMQ==&ch=hdhovNqe7J3y5MVIcSfpiR2RDqZ03BJxIIweHvxGH_3z0bV-JxZLng==)
Friend, This is Congressman Ronny Jackson. I'm the former White House Chief Medical Advisor, a retired Navy Rear Admiral, and Congressman for the MOST Conservative district in the nation. When I talk to the patriotic Americans in my district, I'm hearing one thing: **they are frightened by the radical liberal agenda coming from Washington D.C.** They want STRONG America First conservatives in Washington who will work for THEM, but right now Friend, they aren't liking what they're seeing. name: Team Ro
subject: Your first donation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[1]Ro Khanna

In just a
moment, we’re going to ask you to make your first donation to Ro this year
to hit our End of Month goal. But first, let us explain why meeting this
goal is so important.

For members of Congress like Ro, who doesn’t take corporate PAC money,
fundraising isn’t always a top priority. Ro would rather spend that time
fighting for working families and diving deep into policy proposals.

Unfortunately, in the 2020 election, 88% of Congressional races were won
by the candidate who raised the most money. There is no doubt about it –
in our political system, how much you fundraise can change everything.

Which puts our team in a bit of a sticky situation. Either these emails
raise enough from small-dollar donors that Ro can keep focusing on
fighting for our shared values, or Ro has to spend more time fundraising
to keep our campaign afloat.

[ https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5169?refcode=ema-1613-nd&t=1020&akid=1613%2E946728%2E_BhDwD ]So, can you make
your first donation of 2021 to our campaign, to help us meet our End of
Month goal? We are just $2,764 away from meeting it and we could really
use your support.

[ https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5169?refcode=em-1613-nd&amounts=&t=1021&akid=1613%2E946728%2E_BhDwD ]Contribute

When folks like you
step up and chip in whatever you can towards Ro’s campaign, it’s doing
more than just helping our campaign stay financially stable. It’s a sign
that you support the progressive movement Ro is helping lead – from
Medicare to All to a Green New Deal.

Our systems are not perfect – if they were, money wouldn’t play such a
large role in our elections – but Ro is doing everything he can to make it
a little bit better every day.

[ https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5169?refcode=em-1613-nd&t=1022&akid=1613%2E946728%2E_BhDwD ]If
you can, please chip in what you can to help us meet our first fundraising
goal of 2021 – even $3 can make a big difference.

Thanks for your support,

Team Ro

Contribute to Ro's campaign for re-election: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=em20210131footer&t=1023&refcode2=1613_946728__BhDwD&akid=1613%2E946728%2E_BhDwD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=1613%2E946728%2E_BhDwD

PAID FOR BY RO FOR CONGRESS
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051

clean_body: This first End of Month deadline tonight is our chance to prove that we can compete with the Left's MASSIVE fundraising advantage. But, in order to stake our place in this fight, it is absolutely CRITICAL that we reach goal! Can you help? Friend, I needed to reach out today because our FIRST End of Month fundraising deadline since I took over as the NRSC Chairman is tonight. This past election cycle, we saw Democrats break EVERY fundraising record month after month. We know the infrastructure they have in place and they're ready to raise even MORE this next cycle. This deadline tonight is our first chance to prove that we can compete with the Left 's MASSIVE fundraising advantage. But, in order to stake our place in this fight, it is absolutely CRITICAL that we reach this fundraising goal. == To make sure we reach our goal by the deadline at ==, we've activated == for ALL conservative supporters who chip in. This has been made possible by a group of generous patriots who have pledged early support to build up our ground game. == Please don't let us down when EVERYTHING is at stake. Democrats will have full control, but with your help, we can cut their radical reign short. == Thank you in advance for your generous and early support. name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Help me restore Election Integrity
body:
Joe Biden and the Democrats have taken control of the federal government. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/help-me-restore-election-integrity?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b7a58245f1&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend,
Joe Biden and the Democrats have taken control of the federal government.

But they've exhibited no "unity", no "healing", nor any of the other feel-good platitudes they peddled to get elected.
## Instead, they're flooding the zone with radical, left-wing executive orders that threaten to tear apart our country and empower their progressive establishment forever.
Among Biden's most egregious mandates:
* He rescinded President Trump's policy to KEEP THE CHINESE GOVERNMENT OUT of our nation's power grid
* He terminated the Keystone Pipeline JEOPARDIZING American energy independence and killing American jobs
* He BANNED girls-only sports and girls-only locker rooms
* He authorized AMERICAN TAX DOLLARS to be spent on worldwide abortions

...and much, much, more. Biden has signed OVER 40 executive orders — Nearly 4. Every. Single. Day.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=f7495edc4e&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE")
---
|
## These are not the acts of a man who wants to unite the country; they're payoffs to anti-American activists who got him inaugurated.
Meanwhile, Nancy Pelosi is scheming to jam the most dangerous power grab ever through Congress: mandating Vote-by-Mail nationwide.

No one could be happier with Pelosi's scheme than Governor Phil Murphy.

Murphy's own illegal Vote-by-Mail executive order led to widespread confusion and voter disenfranchisement.

**That's why I took Murphy to court when no one else in the New Jersey Republican Party would stand up to him. **

And that's why I'm still fighting today to hold him accountable in the United States Supreme Court and restore integrity to our elections.

But no matter what the Supreme Court does or doesn't do, you and I can send a message to Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Phil Murphy by ending Murphy's failed governorship.

[_Join my campaign today_](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=35e5c571f8&e=3e017fab0f) to stop the spread of radical, left-wing extremism and ensure election integrity in New Jersey.
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Republican for NJ Governor
## _For the People_
**P.S.** The race for New Jersey governor is the first chance we have to win on the road to reclaiming Congress, the White House, and ultimately our American way of life.

Your immediate support would mean so much to me, our state, and our America First movement. [_Stand with me toda_ y](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a13d9abb98&e=3e017fab0f).
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=14ded6fdf1&e=3e017fab0f "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| | | | | [](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2f517ab5f8&e=3e017fab0f)
---
[](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=00417f0cd1&e=3e017fab0f)
---
[](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=dfdaeebfbc&e=3e017fab0f)
---
[](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c9f030e778&e=3e017fab0f)
---

Singh for GovernorP.O. Box 409Linwood, NJ 08221-0507

name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Morrisey?=
subject: 11 Days of Joe Biden...
body:
These next few years will be very challenging under one-party rule. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1a5a06e265b/11-days-of-joe-biden?e=24057c0240)
---
| |
---
| | 11 Days In...

Dear Peter, I thought I knew just how difficult it would be with President Biden in office. I knew he would go after energy jobs, our borders, our guns, and so many other Constitutional rights we hold dear. But I didn’t predict just how quickly he would try to do it. Within his first 11 days, President Biden wiped away many policies of President Trump which led to energy independence and the best economy the nation has seen in many years. I fear his flurry of executive orders aren’t ending here. His goal isn’t to just destroy President Trump’s policies, but perhaps replace our conservative values with something else entirely. We will never believe in that vision. We believe in the America which made it the greatest nation on Earth — a land of equal opportunity, honesty, fairness, and freedom. A place where hard work gets rewarded. These next few years will be very challenging under one-party rule. However, I know we can turn things around and rebuild the American dream. Of course, before we advance and reclaim Congress and the White House, we first must Defend America and oppose President Biden’s massive overreach. And that’s my role as the West Virginia Attorney General and the role of my GOP Attorneys General colleagues. We are literally the last line of defense against an overreaching federal government. Please share this email with five friends tonight to grow our movement to Defend America. We would be incredibly grateful. Sincerely,
Patrick Morrisey
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
